value_chain_position: Mass-capacity HDD storage — sells nearline HDDs used in hyperscaler cold/warm storage tiers; beneficiary of AI training data lake growth and SMR density advances.
relative_comps: STX and WDC are a duopoly in nearline HDD; that structural concentration is the main moat. 29% YoY revenue recovery is real (post-inventory correction) but the -8% 3-year CAGR shows the structural narrative is AI tailwind atop a cyclical trough, not pure disruption. Relative to PURE or NTAP, STX is the lowest-cost storage tier — hard to fully displace for unstructured AI training data at cost per TB. FCF margin of 24% is solid for a capital-intensive HDD manufacturer.
